page_metadata.biotools__summary: Ribose-Map is a user-friendly, standardized bioinformatics toolkit for the comprehensive analysis of ribonucleotide (rNMP) sequencing experiments. It can be applied to data generated using any high-throughput ribonucleotide sequencing technique, including ribose-seq, emRiboSeq, RHII-HydEn-seq, Alk-HydEn-seq, and Pu-seq.
